                          LATEST FISH LANDINGS

                          • Home
                          • Latest Fish Landings

                          Peterhead Fish Market Information

                          We are experiencing intermittant delays in updating this page. Please check the time stamp on the right for when last updated. Information on fish for the next sale is available from the recorded message on 01779 483666 or by calling the market on 07583 050704. If the fish landings box below does not have a time above it at the right hand side, then the image will be a snapshot taken around 05:00. Users can try clicking on the 'Download pdf file' link below to check if there is any more recent data available.

                          This page is updated at 10:00 every day to show details of the next auction.
                          Fish landing information for previous days is available in the archive

                          Archive of fish market landings
